package WurstExportedObjects_w3d
import ObjEditingNatives
import DoodadObjEditing

// Modified Table (contains all custom objects)

@compiletime function create_w3d_D001()
	new DoodadDefinition('D001', 'LWw0')
	..setName(0, "Fel Waterfall")
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setLvlDataInt("dvb1", 1, 0, 50)
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setLvlDataInt("dvg1", 1, 0, 200)
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setLvlDataInt("dvr1", 1, 0, 50)
	..setModel(0, "war3mapImported\\Prop_WaterfallNOSPLASH.mdl")


// Original Table (contains all modified default/melee objects)
// These are emitted when createObjectDefinition uses the same base/new id.

@compiletime function create_w3d_CRrs()
	new DoodadDefinition('CRrs', 'CRrs')
	..setPathTexture(0, "")


@compiletime function create_w3d_CRrk()
	new DoodadDefinition('CRrk', 'CRrk')
	..setPathTexture(0, "")


@compiletime function create_w3d_CRfs()
	new DoodadDefinition('CRfs', 'CRfs')
	..setPathTexture(0, "")
